title: After Mythos: New Playbooks For a Zero-Window Era
summary: When patching isn’t fast enough, NDR helps contain the next era of threats.
card_summary: When patching isn’t fast enough, NDR helps contain the next era of threats.

sections.technical: If you’ve been tracking advancements in AI, you know the exploit window, the short buffer that organizations relied on to patch and protect after a vulnerability disclosure, is closing fast. Anthropic’s new model, Claude Mythos, and its Project Glasswing, showed that finding exploitable vulnerabilities and subtle cracks

title: Chinese Silk Typhoon Hacker Extradited to U.S. Over COVID Research Cyberattacks
summary: A Chinese national accused of being a member of the Silk Typhoon hacking group has been extradited to the U.S. from Italy.
card_summary: A Chinese national accused of being a member of the Silk Typhoon hacking group has been extradited to the U.S. from Italy.

sections.impact:
Xu Zewei, 34, was arrested in July 2025 by Italian authorities for his alleged links to the Chinese state-sponsored threat group and for orchestrating cyber attacks against American organizations and government agencies between February 2020 and June 2021, including

Assessed severity: MEDIUM.

email_summary: A Chinese national accused of being a member of the Silk Typhoon hacking group has been extradited to the U.S. from Italy. Xu Zewei, 34, was arrested in July 2025 by Italian authorities for his alleged links to the Chinese state-sponsored threat group and for orchestrating cyber attacks against American organizations and government agencies between February 2020 and June 2021, including.

title: Microsoft Patches Entra ID Role Flaw That Enabled Service Principal Takeover
summary: An administrative role meant for artificial intelligence (AI) agents within Microsoft Entra ID could enable privilege escalation and identity takeover attacks, according to new findings from Silverfort.
card_summary: An administrative role meant for artificial intelligence (AI) agents within Microsoft Entra ID could enable privilege escalation and identity takeover attacks, according to new findings from Silverfort.
email_summary: An administrative role meant for artificial intelligence (AI) agents within Microsoft Entra ID could enable privilege escalation and identity takeover attacks, according to new findings from Silverfort. Severity is rated high.

title: Microsoft Confirms Active Exploitation of Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202
summary: Microsoft on Monday revised its advisory for a now-patched, high-severity security flaw impacting Windows Shell to acknowledge that it has been actively exploited in the wild.
card_summary: Microsoft on Monday revised its advisory for a now-patched, high-severity security flaw impacting Windows Shell to acknowledge that it has been actively exploited in the wild.

sections.mitigation: It was addressed as part of its Patch Tuesday update for this Microsoft on Monday revised its advisory for a now-patched, high-severity security flaw impacting Windows Shell to acknowledge that it has been actively exploited in the wild.

email_summary: Microsoft on Monday revised its advisory for a now-patched, high-severity security flaw impacting Windows Shell to acknowledge that it has been actively exploited in the wild. Tracked as CVE-2026-32202.

title: Microsoft asks iPhone users to reauthenticate after Outlook outage
summary: After addressing a widespread outage that affected Outlook.com users worldwide on Monday, Microsoft has asked iPhone users to re-enter their credentials to regain access to their Outlook and Hotmail accounts via the default Mail app. [...]
